originalBehavior: The source family is split across separate blockchain, signing, and proof demos with distinct entry routes and teaching surfaces.
localStatus: The local route adds one lightweight roadmap page that introduces the full sequence and keeps each chapter accessible through local links.
notes: The route is intentionally a synthesis page rather than a runtime rewrite of the original demos.
The public body links only to local replica chapters and docs routes.
evidence: The route hero and chapter cards expose the three-step teaching order and local chapter links.
Shared smoke coverage checks the chapter anchors, local route handoff, and responsive shell.

originalBehavior: The original learning path requires separate navigation from block hashing into public and private keys plus transaction signing scenes.
localStatus: The local route keeps those chapter boundaries intact while adding a guided handoff from hashing to signing and transaction scenes through local route links.
notes: Hashing, distributed-chain, signing, and transaction runtime behavior still lives in the original shipped local chapter routes.
The combined route simply sequences the order and explains why each chapter comes next.
evidence: The chapter cards link directly to the hashing route, distributed view, signing route, and transaction route.
Shared smoke coverage verifies those local handoff links are present on the combined route.

originalBehavior: The proof demo is published as a separate route with its own interaction model and provenance surfaces.
localStatus: The local route frames the proof demo as the final chapter, links to the local proof route, and keeps original-page provenance limited to the shared footer.
notes: The final chapter card links only to the local proof route.
The public body does not ship upstream chapter links, repo links, or social surfaces.
evidence: Implementation planning treated local-only navigation and footer-only provenance as the core public-surface requirement for this custom route.
Shared smoke coverage checks the responsive shell and the local chapter handoff for the proof section.
